  My name is David Utomi, this is my project 1 web development project for quickstart.
   i decided to make a website for the sale of rings, with html languge and bootstrap css,
   i used the lux theme from the bootswatch page as well as classes="". i also did some of my ow css,
   making everything on the website come together nicely.
   The website has three pages and all are interactive, the top left text on all pages can be used to get back to the main page "DAVES RINGS".
   the first one being HOME, second being COLLECTION, third being ABOUT.
